title: Percy Jackson and the Olympians Experience
description: Disney is bringing back Percy Jackson and the Olympians for another mythological adventure that begins by entering Poseidon’s trident before choosing one of three paths inspired by Percy, Annabeth, or Thalia. The activation ties into the upcoming third season, based on Rick Riordan’s The Titan’s Curse.

title: Attack of the Killer Tomatoes Party
price: TBA - Food & Drink Available for Purchase
description: Join us for the Attack of the Killer Comic-Con After Party, celebrating Attack of the Killer Tomatoes: Organic Intelligence, the wild new chapter of the cult classic that started in San Diego back in 1978. We’re taking over Good Night John Boy in the heart of the Gaslamp for a night of retro-radness featuring cast meet & greets, killer cosplay, exclusive giveaways, ripe DJs and specialty themed cocktails and bites (*available for purchase). Whether you’ve loved the tomatoes since ’78, you’re here for the brand-new Attack of the Killer Tomatoes: Organic Intelligence, or you're looking to party after Comic-Con, this is a Saturday-night bash you don't wanna miss.
notes: Food and drinks available for purchase.

title: Star Trek Fleet Command: 60 Years of Star Trek Archives Experience
description: Celebrate Star Trek's 60th anniversary through an immersive archive experience featuring official archive pieces, a Holodeck VR experience, themed photo opportunities, exclusive swag, interactive claw machines, and a souvenir photo station where guests can choose their faction and receive a personalized Star Trek card.
notes: Not affiliated with San Diego Comic-Con.

title: Star Trek: Boldly Built Activation
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Step into the Star Trek universe where the LEGO Group and Magic: The Gathering come together for an interactive photo opportunity celebrating two iconic brands.
notes: Open Thursday through Sunday.

title: AREA 619 Speakeasy @ barleymash
description: barleymash transforms into AREA 619 with themed food, drinks, and the invite-only Space Smugglers Cantina cocktail lounge.
notes: DM @barleymashsd for the secret password. Special menu includes the Zoidberg-er, Drax-A-Roni & Cheese, Pizza Planet Pockets, and Experiment 626 dessert.

title: Outer-Space Dance Party
description: Dance the night away at The Blind Burro's Comic-Con-themed outer-space dance party featuring themed cocktails, music, and late-night fun.
notes: 21+ event.

title: Poké Puffs @ Cafe de l'Opera
description: Cafe de l'Opera is serving Pokémon-inspired Poké Puffs in Sweet, Mint, Citrus, Mocha, and Spice flavors.
notes: Available while supplies last.

title: Garage Kitchen + Bar Super Deals
description: Enjoy Comic-Con food and drink specials throughout the day.
notes: $20 Bottomless Mimosa Brunch (11 AM–3 PM), $6 Crazy Bob's Burger & Fries (11 AM–12 PM & 3 PM–4 PM), Happy Hour with 51% off drinks and $3 off appetizers (4 PM–6 PM).

title: Pokémon Speakeasy & Costume Contest
description: Union Kitchen + Tap is going all in on Pokemon this year with a secret Pokemon speakeasy, Eeveelution drink specials, as well as reffle and collectible prizes! They are also holding a costume contest on Saturday, July 25.

title: Peanuts Specialty Lattes @ Spill the Beans
description: Celebrate the Peanuts activation with Comic-Con-exclusive specialty lattes.
notes: Featuring The Great Pumpkin Latte and Charlie Brown Lemon Bar Latte.

title: The Diamond Room Lunch Specials
description: Grab-and-go Comic-Con lunch specials available throughout Comic-Con week.
notes: Daily lunch specials begin at $12.

title: Lunar Landing Bar
description: LandShark Bar & Grill transforms into the Lunar Landing Bar, an immersive tropical spaceport featuring cosmic cocktails, celestial décor, interactive photo moments, and live entertainment.
notes: Runs July 22–26. RSVP encouraged.

title: Marvel Menu @ Cloak & Petal
description: Michelin Guide-recognized Cloak & Petal celebrates Comic-Con with a Marvel-inspired menu of sushi rolls and specialty cocktails.
notes: Featured items include the Spidey Sense Roll, Deadpool Sashimi, Shinobi Logan, Ronin Wolverine, and Berserker Weapon X cocktail.

title: Osteria Panevino Comic-Con Special
description: Enjoy a special three-course Comic-Con menu featuring authentic Italian cuisine.
notes: $45 per person. Reservations are recommended during Comic-Con week.

title: DEVOTION: When Passion Becomes Community
description: Celebrate San Diego Comic-Con weekend with San Diego NFT Friends at DEVOTION, a community meetup bringing together fans, collectors, creators, and newcomers to celebrate VeeFriends, Pudgy Penguins, and the communities built around them.
notes: Registration and host approval required. Complimentary meal tickets are limited to confirmed RSVPs. Admission includes appetizers, a choice of gourmet Tijuana-style hot dog or smash burger, fries, fountain drink or Mexican horchata or Jamaica, and fresh churros for dessert. Guests without a meal ticket are still welcome and may purchase food and beverages at the venue. Alcoholic beverages are available next door through The Lost Abbey. Outdoor event with limited shade; ride-sharing is recommended due to limited parking.

title: LANTERNS Training Headquarters
description: Train to become a member of the Green Lantern Corps in HBO Max's immersive LANTERNS Training Headquarters. Guests complete a series of interactive challenges inspired by the upcoming DC Studios series while testing their courage, teamwork, and problem-solving skills.
notes: Reservations required. Sign-ups open July 13 at 9:00 AM PT on a first-come, first-served basis. Guests must be 18 or older. Includes Guardian briefing, target practice, trust challenges, maze navigation, escape room-style scenarios, a custom Green Lantern ring, Snapchat-powered interactive mirror, exclusive merchandise, and nearby Lantern Recharge Stations with surprise swag throughout the Gaslamp Quarter.

title: STUART FAILS TO SAVE THE UNIVERSE
description: Step inside Stuart's 'The Comic Center of Pasadena' from THE BIG BANG THEORY universe in this immersive HBO Max activation inspired by STUART FAILS TO SAVE THE UNIVERSE. Journey through multiple realities while discovering your hero archetype.
notes: Features portal walkthroughs, interactive story moments, hero archetype experiences, photo opportunities with a replica machine from the series, exclusive merchandise, and personalized collectible takeaways. Open to the public while capacity allows.
tags: Stuart Fails to Save the Universe

title: Marvel Contest of Champions
location: Marvel x Moonrock Gaming Lounge at the Marriott Marquis San Diego Marina
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101 (San Diego Ballroom)
description: Kabam brings Marvel Contest of Champions to the Marvel x Moonrock Gaming Lounge with hands-on demos, daily tournaments, exclusive giveaways, and the new Towers game mode.
notes: No SDCC badge required. Play the Towers demo to receive an exclusive pin and a spin on the prize wheel for in-game rewards and physical prizes. Experienced players can qualify for the daily on-stage tournament by posting one of the four fastest demo times.

title: The Silo Experience
description: Step into the underground world of Apple TV+'s 'Silo' in an immersive, multi-sensory experience that transports visitors inside the mysterious silo to explore the tension, intrigue, and atmosphere of the acclaimed series.
notes: Free and open to all San Diego Comic-Con attendees and the general public. Hours listed as 11:00 AM–7:00 PM (schedule subject to change).

title: SDCC Gaming Lounge
location: Marriott Marquis San Diego Marina – San Diego Ballroom
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: San Diego Comic-Con's official Gaming Lounge returns with over 15,000 square feet of gaming space featuring open play, console and PC gaming, tabletop games, tournaments, demonstrations, and partner activations from Paramount Games, Mythos TCG, and Alienware.
notes: Features the Naruto Mythos TCG with a daily tournament, stage programming, and merchandise. Experience Avatar: Legends with 25 PC gaming stations, two daily tournaments, autograph/sign stations, QR codes for wishlists and purchases, and social media activations. Alienware will showcase gaming laptops, interactive game demos, and a special stunt experience.

title: Peanuts x Super7 Pop-Up
address: 200 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Peanuts and Super7 celebrate San Diego Comic-Con with an interactive pop-up featuring Snoopy, his siblings, and the wider Peanuts cast.
notes: Features the Adopt-a-Puppy experience with exclusive 8-inch Super Duper Plush collectibles, adoption certificates, puppy bandanas created with Best Friends Animal Society, Comic-Con exclusives, Snoopy & Lucy mascot photo opportunities, giveaways, and surprises.

title: Audible Level Up Lounge with Dungeon Crawler Carl and Heads Will Roll
description: Audible's interactive Level Up Lounge celebrates Dungeon Crawler Carl and Bobiverse with themed experiences, exclusive prizes, listening lounges, cosplay touch-up stations, phone charging, photo opportunities, and more.
notes: Guests can complete themed activities to earn XP, redeemable for exclusive loot and prizes. Features include a Bobiverse-inspired BobNet zone, Dungeon Crawler Carl survival station, listening lounges, cosplay repair station, charging stations, and photo opportunities.

title: Paramount+'s The Lodge
price: Free - Ticketed - Sold Out, Stand By Available
description: Official Paramount+ immersive off-site experience featuring multiple Paramount properties.
notes: Standby line available if tickets remain.

title: SEGA Sonic Emerald Drop
description: Fans can track down the activation to scan the QR code to be entered for the chance to win exclusive Sonic prizes, including the ultimate grand prize: a VIP trip for two to the grand opening of Club Chaos in New York City, complete with airfare, hotel accommodations, and event tickets. Better yet, San Diego is the only stop where fans will also have a chance to win an exclusive Leblon Delienne Sonic sculpture.

title: OpGames Street Team Handing Out Games (Not Yet Announced)
Robert A. Heinlein Blood Drive
description: Donate blood during Comic-Con and receive exclusive promotional items while supplies last.
notes: Appointments available through the official registration link. Sunday hours are 9:00 AM-3:30 PM.

title: IGN: Brisk x Splatoon Raiders Pop-Up
description: Play Splatoon Raiders on Nintendo Switch 2, grab free Brisk iced tea, and compete in water-gun arcade games for exclusive Brisk x Splatoon swag.
notes: Ticketed/Standby may be required.

title: Petco Interactive Zone: Hello Kitty Truck, Labu'Tique Shop & MaruMart
description: A free, interactive fan zone experience where fans can explore larger-than-life displays featuring Hello Kitty Truck, Labu'Tique Shop, MaruMart, KAYOU interactive zone, and additional Comic-Con experiences.

title: Ignition Press Room Pavilion
description: Meet comic creators, shop convention-exclusive comics and covers, and visit the Ignition Press creator pavilion.
notes: Featured creators include Tini Howard, Jeremy Haun, Cullen Bunn, Rob Guillory, Tim Seeley, Christian Ward, Leah Williams, Stephanie Williams, Olivia Dufault, Joe Eisma, and more.

title: Marvel Games Lounge
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Meet fellow Marvel Contest of Champions Summoners and participate in exclusive in-person Towers experiences.

title: Hulu Animayhem
description: Hulu Animayhem will also be taking over the Gaslamp along the MLK Promenade, with an experience that’s going to have your mouth watering. Fans can grab themed food and drinks inspired by Futurama and King of the Hill, including Fry’s “100 Days of Cold Brew” and Bobby Hill’s Robata Chane, while exploring interactive environments, hunting for Easter eggs, and shopping exclusive merchandise.

title: Adult Swim on the Green
location: Bayfront Park - Behind the Convention Center
description: Adult Swim's interactive Comic-Con experience featuring games, activities, and exclusive programming.

title: Bandai Dragon Ball Xenoverse
description: Get an early hands-on demo of Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 during Bandai Namco's road tour.

title: Clash of Clans
address: 849 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA
description: Complete physical puzzle challenges and interactive games inspired by Clash of Clans with the Archer Queen.
notes: Tickets went on sale July 1.

title: Donut Bar San Diego Comic-Con Themed Donuts
address: 401 W A St #130, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Limited edition Comic-Con themed donuts available daily during SDCC.

title: Pendry Hotel Donut Bar
description: Comic-Con themed donuts served alongside Provisional's breakfast menu.
notes: Available while supplies last.

title: PopUp Bagels
address: Outside Pendry Hotel, 550 J Street, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Fresh-baked bagels with plain and scallion schmears served until sold out.

title: Kitties and Coffee for Comic-Con
description: Enjoy a 50-minute visit with adoptable cats plus a food or drink item.

title: Candyland Cafe
description: A 90-minute immersive Candy Land themed dining experience featuring interactive sets and themed food.
notes: 90-minute experience.

title: Spider-Man / Tom Holland Bero Event
description: Enjoy Tom Holland’s non-alcoholic beer brand, BERO, served in exclusive Spider-Man: Brand New Day-themed cans available only during the event. The activation will also feature immersive photo opportunities and appearances by Spider-Man (which we’re assuming is a guy in a Spider-Man costume, and not, y’know, Tom Holland himself). The event is free and open to the public on a first-come, first-served basis, with BERO samples available for guests 21 and older.

title: Superhero Tea
description: Comic-Con themed afternoon tea with gourmet treats, champagne, live harp music and superhero photo opportunities.

title: The Gaslamp Food Crawl (San Diego) Special Event!
description: Grab your crawl-tasting pass at Tivoli Bar as you set off to taste creative food bites and drinks. All included! A few featured venues on the crawl: Wine Girl, The Escape Room, Whiskey House, Villians BBQ. Storyhouse Distillery, EVTB, Tivoli Bar and Gill and more to be announced.

title: Comic-Con Themed Bar Crawl
description: Tickets range from $12.51 for early bird to $12.51, and up to $28.52 for a 3-day pass. The cost will pay for your cover to all venues

title: Chuck Jones Gallery Pop-Up Meet & Greet - Steve Barton
address: 809 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA
description: Disney artist and seascape painter Steve Barton debuts his first-ever original Looney Tunes artwork collection during a special Comic-Con appearance.

title: Young Justice Meet-up
address: 111 W. Harbor Drive, San Diego, CA, 92101

title: Steampunk Meet-up
location: San Diego Convention Center - Back Stairs
address: 111 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Annual gathering for Steampunk fans and cosplayers.

title: Arcane / League of Legends Fan Cosplay Photoshoot
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA, 92101
description: Marriott Marquis San Diego Marina, near the fountain. No badge is required.

title: Oshis By The Ocean
description: The San Diego based Oshikatsu Social Club, dedicated to promoting a positive Oshi culture

title: He-Man Meet-Up
location: Mezzanine level of the San Diego Convention Center
description: The power of Greyskull! Channel your Masters of the Universe power (and don your best Skeletor, She-Ra, or other MOTU cosplay) and join the He-Man fan meet-up

title: Uma Musume Pretty Derby Cosplay Meetup
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA, 92101
description: Attendees can take part in a group cosplay photoshoot, compete for Uma Musume-themed prizes, play the mobile game, enjoy complimentary water, and catch a special guest performance.

title: Over 30 Cosplay Meet-Up
location: Mezzanine level of the San Diego Convention Center

title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure Cosplay Meet-up
address: 333 W Harbor Dr, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Meet fellow JoJo fans for a group cosplay gathering and photos.

title: 10th Annual Light Saber World Championships
description: Watch competitors battle in the Underground Light Saber Fighters' annual Comic-Con championships.
notes: Free to watch. Competitors must have attended Lionheart Academy training sessions. Contact ULF for participation requirements.

title: Mezco Meet-Up
description: Collector and toy photographer The Toy Paige hosts a meetup for Mezco fans and collectors.

title: Turtle By The Beach
description: Presented by Comics and Cocktails, featuring Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles creators, artists, signings, sketches, exclusives, and merchandise throughout the day.
notes: Walk-in event with rotating creator appearances including Mateus Santolouco, Ben Bishop, Ciro Nieli, Tom Waltz and more.

title: Thrilljoy Block Party: Rock the Block
description: Thrilljoy returns to SDCC with its Rock the Block collector celebration.

title: Star Wars Night at San Diego FC Soccer
description: San Diego FC hosts a special Star Wars Night celebration during Comic-Con weekend.

title: Adult Swim on the Green: Adult Swim Through the Years
location: Bayfront Park - Behind the Convention Center
description: Adult Swim celebrates its history with themed programming, a cosplay dance party, and a live animation set by Afuchs Twin.
notes: DJ dance party from 9:00 PM–10:00 PM.

title: Corpse Tour @ Now or Never Comics
description: Meet the creative team behind Exquisite Corpses and Rascal Randy for conversations, signings, and exclusive merchandise.

title: One More Time Presents Comic Tron - Comic Con After Party
description: One More Time Presents Comic Tron, a Comic-Con after party celebrating fandom with music, dancing, cosplay, and themed entertainment.

title: San Diego Anime Rave
description: Celebrate Comic-Con weekend at the San Diego Anime Rave with anime-inspired music, cosplay, dancing, and fandom celebrations.
notes: 21+ event.

title: Cosplay Corner at PARQ
description: Suit up and head to PARQ Nightclub for Cosplay Corner, a late-night Comic-Con celebration featuring cosplay, music, dancing, and fandom festivities from 10:00 PM–2:00 AM.
notes: 21+ event.

title: Rooftop Cinema: The Notebook
address: 1835 Columbia St, 5th Floor, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Enjoy a rooftop screening of the beloved romantic drama The Notebook under the San Diego sky at Rooftop Cinema Club.

title: Rooftop Cinema: The Princess Bride
address: 1835 Columbia St, 5th Floor, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Watch the fantasy classic The Princess Bride on the rooftop with skyline views during Comic-Con weekend.

title: Rooftop Cinema: Chicago
address: 1835 Columbia St, 5th Floor, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Enjoy an evening rooftop screening of the Academy Award-winning musical Chicago with panoramic views of downtown San Diego.

title: Jason Mewes: Diary of a Manchild
description: Jason Mewes brings his one-man comedy show, Diary of a Manchild, to Comic-Con weekend as part of the Kevin Smith live event series.
notes: Part of the 'Jay & Silent Bob Are In The Hizzhouse' weekend.

title: Rooftop Cinema: The Notebook
address: 1835 Columbia St, 5th Floor, San Diego, CA 92101
description: An evening rooftop screening of the romantic classic The Notebook beneath the San Diego skyline.
notes: Evening screening.

title: Hollywood Babble-On with Kevin Smith
description: Kevin Smith records a live episode of Hollywood Babble-On during Comic-Con weekend, featuring comedy, pop culture, celebrity stories, and audience interaction.

title: Den of Geek Presents: West Coast Legends - Cracked Comedy Club x National Lampoon
address: 750 Sixth Avenue, 2nd Floor, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Den of Geek and National Lampoon present a stand-up comedy showcase featuring comedians you've seen on Netflix, Hulu, HBO, Comedy Central, and more.
notes: One free beer included with every ticket.

title: Rooftop Cinema: Scream
address: 1835 Columbia St, 5th Floor, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Watch Wes Craven's horror classic Scream during a late-night rooftop screening at Rooftop Cinema Club.

title: Rooftop Cinema: Sinners
address: 1835 Columbia St, 5th Floor, San Diego, CA 92101
description: Catch a midnight rooftop screening of Sinners during Comic-Con weekend at Rooftop Cinema Club.
notes: Midnight screening.
